title: Home Screen displays Free60+ headset image after successful pairing
steps: 1. Launch the mobile application and complete the onboarding flow (splash screen, EULA acceptance, location permission grant).
2. Navigate to the Bluetooth pairing screen and initiate device discovery.
3. Put the Free60+ headset into pairing mode.
4. Select the Free60+ headset from the discovered devices list to pair.
5. Wait for the pairing confirmation message (e.g., 'Device connected' or similar).
6. Navigate to the Home Screen (main screen after pairing).
7. Observe the headset image area on the Home Screen.
expected: The Home Screen displays a headset image corresponding to the Free60+ model. The image is clearly visible, properly rendered, and not blank, broken, or replaced by a placeholder.

title: Home Screen displays Free 20 headset image after successful pairing
steps: 1. Launch the mobile application and complete the onboarding flow (splash screen, EULA acceptance, location permission grant).
2. Navigate to the Bluetooth pairing screen and initiate device discovery.
3. Put the Free 20 headset into pairing mode.
4. Select the Free 20 headset from the discovered devices list to pair.
5. Wait for the pairing confirmation message (e.g., 'Device connected' or similar).
6. Navigate to the Home Screen (main screen after pairing).
7. Observe the headset image area on the Home Screen.
expected: The Home Screen displays a headset image corresponding to the Free 20 model. The image is clearly visible, properly rendered, and not blank, broken, or replaced by a placeholder.

title: Home Screen headset image area is not blank or placeholder after pairing Free60+
steps: 1. Launch the mobile application and complete the onboarding flow.
2. Pair the Free60+ headset following the standard pairing procedure.
3. Navigate to the Home Screen.
4. Inspect the headset image area for any placeholder icons, blank spaces, or error indicators (e.g., broken image icon).
5. Take a screenshot of the Home Screen for visual verification.
expected: The headset image area on the Home Screen contains a valid, rendered image of the Free60+ headset. No placeholder, blank space, broken image icon, or generic silhouette is shown.

title: Home Screen headset image area is not blank or placeholder after pairing Free 20
steps: 1. Launch the mobile application and complete the onboarding flow.
2. Pair the Free 20 headset following the standard pairing procedure.
3. Navigate to the Home Screen.
4. Inspect the headset image area for any placeholder icons, blank spaces, or error indicators (e.g., broken image icon).
5. Take a screenshot of the Home Screen for visual verification.
expected: The headset image area on the Home Screen contains a valid, rendered image of the Free 20 headset. No placeholder, blank space, broken image icon, or generic silhouette is shown.

title: Home Screen headset image persists after re-entering the screen (Free60+)
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding.
2. Pair the Free60+ headset.
3. Navigate to the Home Screen and verify the headset image is displayed.
4. Navigate away from the Home Screen (e.g., go to Settings or Device Info screen).
5. Navigate back to the Home Screen.
6. Observe the headset image area.
expected: The Free60+ headset image is still displayed correctly on the Home Screen after navigating away and returning. The image is not missing, blank, or replaced by a placeholder.

title: Home Screen headset image persists after re-entering the screen (Free 20)
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding.
2. Pair the Free 20 headset.
3. Navigate to the Home Screen and verify the headset image is displayed.
4. Navigate away from the Home Screen (e.g., go to Settings or Device Info screen).
5. Navigate back to the Home Screen.
6. Observe the headset image area.
expected: The Free 20 headset image is still displayed correctly on the Home Screen after navigating away and returning. The image is not missing, blank, or replaced by a placeholder.

title: Home Screen headset image updates correctly when switching from Free60+ to Free 20
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding.
2. Pair the Free60+ headset and navigate to Home Screen. Verify Free60+ image is displayed.
3. Unpair or disconnect the Free60+ headset.
4. Put the Free 20 headset into pairing mode and pair it with the device.
5. Navigate to the Home Screen.
6. Observe the headset image area.
expected: The Home Screen now displays the Free 20 headset image instead of the Free60+ image. The image updates correctly to reflect the currently paired headset model.

title: Home Screen headset image updates correctly when switching from Free 20 to Free60+
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding.
2. Pair the Free 20 headset and navigate to Home Screen. Verify Free 20 image is displayed.
3. Unpair or disconnect the Free 20 headset.
4. Put the Free60+ headset into pairing mode and pair it with the device.
5. Navigate to the Home Screen.
6. Observe the headset image area.
expected: The Home Screen now displays the Free60+ headset image instead of the Free 20 image. The image updates correctly to reflect the currently paired headset model.

title: Home Screen shows no headset image when no device is paired
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete the onboarding flow.
2. Skip or cancel the device pairing process.
3. Navigate to the Home Screen.
4. Observe the headset image area on the Home Screen.
expected: The headset image area on the Home Screen does not display any headset image. It may show a 'No device connected' message, a generic placeholder, or remain empty — but no specific headset model image is shown.
